title: Three Little Girls in Blue
writer: Valentine Davies, Brown Holmes, Lynn Starling
actors: June Haver, George Montgomery, Vivian Blaine
plot: A reworking of the movie "Three Blind Mice" (1938) based on the play of the same name, which in turn led to the remake, "Moon Over Miami" (1941). This version is set during the turn of the century. Three sisters from Red Bank set ...
